equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 5% Damage for each available potion
equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon two additional Lightning bolts.
equipmentMods.goblet: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the same damage as Chain Lightning.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain additional 2% damage bonus for each extra inventory slot

equipmentMods.amulet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.belt: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain additional 2% damage bonus for each extra inventory slot
equipmentMods.goblet: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages are no longer illusions and remain on the battlefield for an additional 0.5 seconds.
equipmentMods.helmet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.horn: Delusion of Zelkors: Spawn two additional mages.
equipmentMods.trinket: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages' explosions now spawn fire spikes, dealing an additional 20% damage for every active mage.

equipmentMods.belt: Fire Orbs: Once the Orb finishes charging, it explodes emitting a wave of Fire dealing 100% damage + 20% more damage for every extra second it charged.
equipmentMods.goblet: Fire Orbs: Orbs now charge for additonal 2 seconds.
equipmentMods.trinket: Fire Orbs: Each orb launches two mini-orbs at your targets, dealing 50% damage.

equipmentMods.amulet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.belt: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.
equipmentMods.goblet: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.

equipmentMods.belt: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.helmet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.relic: Each time you get hit,  Gain 15% more damage up to 75%. Blessing is 30 seconds long.
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 300 damage, and any damage you take will deal at least 50% of your health.
equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss while Bloodlust is active has a 10% chance to give stacks of Blood, increasing your Physical Damage by 1% per stack, up to 100
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.
equipmentMods.helmet: Gain 3% Fire Damage for each Critical Chance above 100%
equipmentMods.horn: Статический Заряд: Получает заряды нанося урон противникам. Каждый заряд даёт +1% к урону Молнией. При достижении 100 зарядов призывает молнии на поле боя.
equipmentMods.relic: У вас есть 8% шанс призвать Магического Орла, который наносит урон Арканой перед собой в течение 6 секунд. Магический Орёл получает усиление от вашего Бонуса к Урону Арканой
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.belt: Starblades: Starblades have a 25% chance of striking twice.
equipmentMods.goblet: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.
equipmentMods.horn: Electric Dragons: For each dragon, all other dragons deals 95% increase damage.
equipmentMods.relic: While moving, your character generates Veil stacks, up to 50. Gain 0.5% Damage Reduction per stack but getting hit will drop all stacks
equipmentMods.trinket: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.

equipmentMods.belt: Lames Célestes : gagne une lame supplémentaire qui inflige 75% de dégâts.
equipmentMods.goblet: Starblades: For each extra blade, all blades deal 75% additional damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Lames Célestes : les Lames Célestes ont 25% de chance de frapper deux fois.
equipmentMods.trinket: Lames Célestes : gagne une lame supplémentaire qui inflige 75% de dégâts.

equipmentMods.amulet: For every 30 points of your highest stat, gain 1% Damage bonus.
equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Totems: Totems stay for an additional 0.6 seconds and have a 50% chance to pulse with electricity when struck by lightning, dealing 150% damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Elemental Damage for every 40 of your highest stat.
equipmentMods.goblet: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the same damage as Chain Lightning.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.boots: When losing more than 40 stacks of Light Shroud - gain 50% Movement Speed and 50 Base Damage for 15 seconds.

equipmentMods.goblet: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 33% chance to deal Triple Damage.
Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Starblades: For each extra blade, all blades deal 75% additional damage.
